creator: m.ne@gmx.net
text:
Created attachment 221018
patch for print/lilypond to 2.21.82

- Update to 2.21.82
- Remove deprecated dependency on Python 2.7

Although 2.21.82 technically is an unstable release, I consider temporarily using that version preferable to losing the port with the pending removal of Python 2 from the ports tree. From a user's perspective it should be pretty much identical to the upcoming stable 2.22 release, which should be ready early to mid january.
